app.name: JobLiberty
app.tagline: Find the right job with AI-powered confidence.
app.mission: Helping African job seekers unlock career opportunities through AI.
app.vision: Making intelligent career guidance accessible to everyone.

step1.title: Upload your resume
step1.desc: Upload your CV in PDF format. Our AI will analyze it in seconds.

step2.title: Get comprehensive analysis
step2.desc: Receive detailed ATS scores, skill breakdowns, and improvement recommendations.

step3.title: Discover matching opportunities
step3.desc: Browse curated job matches with match percentages and skill breakdowns.

step4.title: Take action & grow
step4.desc: Follow personalized learning plans, prepare for interviews, and track progress.

testimonials.title: Loved by job seekers across Africa

t1.quote: JobLiberty helped me identify gaps in my resume I didn't even know existed. I landed my first role at a fintech company within 6 weeks.
t1.name: Aisha Bello

t2.quote: As an NYSC member, this tool gave me the confidence and data I needed to apply for roles. I got 3 interviews in one week.
t2.name: Chinedu Okoro

t3.quote: The Opportunity Mode is genius. It showed me exactly what skills to add to go from 63% to 91% match. Incredible.
t3.name: Fatima Ibrahim

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, the core features including resume analysis and basic job matching are completely free. Premium features like unlimited reports and interview simulations will be available soon.
faq.a2: We fully support English, Hausa, Yoruba, and Igbo. You can switch languages anytime in the settings or navbar.
faq.q3: Is my resume data private and secure?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Your resume is analyzed locally and never stored without your explicit consent. All data is encrypted and you can delete it anytime.
faq.q4: How accurate are the job matches?
faq.a4: Our AI models are trained on Nigerian and African market data. Matches are based on skills, experience, and location relevance. Average user satisfaction is over 87%.
